rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk named live, did it anyway, that's a round won clean. Pink jockstrap at Balmoral two weeks running now, changed in the men's room — the choice is becoming a habit even if the poncho's still on. Round lost: Apollo ring and necklace stayed home on work days — pool nerves, ring size, pendant reading too gay. Named it clearly, which counts, but the joy police still got that one.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud the moment his actual life — work, people who know him — is watching.
